auth.mustChangePassword: You must change your password before continuing.

dashboard.noBooking: You have not booked your parents' seats yet.
dashboard.cartActive: You have a cart hold — {{remaining}} remaining.

groupSelect.title: Pick your group
groupSelect.subtitle: Choose Group A or Group B. Your mother and father will sit in the same group.

sideSelect.title: Pick a side to start
sideSelect.subtitle: Choose either side — the matching seat on the opposite side is reserved automatically.

confirmation.title: Booking confirmed
confirmation.subtitle: Tickets sent to your KFS email. Bring the QR codes to the gate.

myBookings.title: My booking
myBookings.cancelConfirm: After cancelling you have {{minutes}} minutes to pick replacement seats. After that your allocation is forfeited.

rebook.pickHint: Tap any seat in VIP A or VIP B. The opposite-side mirror is auto-paired. The seat is held for 10 minutes for you to confirm.
rebook.cartHint: Confirm before the timer runs out, or release to pick another seat.
rebook.confirmDetails: Group {{group}} · Row {{row}} · Seat {{seat}} (mother and father auto-paired)
rebook.confirmHint: Tickets and QR codes are generated when you confirm.
rebook.readOnlyHint: The map is read-only. Cancel below to pick a different seat.
rebook.cancelConfirm: Cancel this booking? Your seats are released and you can pick a new pair within the rebook window.
rebook.cancelledNowPick: Booking cancelled. Pick a new seat — your rebook window is open.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.seatTaken: That seat is no longer available — please pick another.
errors.cartExpired: Your cart hold expired. Please pick again.
